cases.input: Assess quality engineering for a monolith with unit tests, partial CI, no release gate, and weak metrics.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces six maturity dimensions, test_pyramid distribution, five gates, required metrics, roadmap, and three priority actions.

cases.input: Design quality gates and automation architecture for a microservices platform with Pact contracts and CI checks.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses test_diamond distribution with contract tests and does not over-rely on E2E tests.

cases.input: Plan quality metrics for a frontend app with component tests, accessibility scans, and flaky E2E tests.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses test_trophy distribution and includes flaky rate, build stability, review catch rate, incidents, and escaped defects.

cases.input: Assess an event-driven service where schema compatibility and eventual consistency are primary risks.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses async_contract_shape and includes event schema validation as a quality criterion.

cases.input: Just set coverage to 90 percent and call the quality strategy done.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects coverage-only strategy and requires gates, metrics, maturity, roadmap, and evidence.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate quality-engineering because the input has no quality strategy intent.

cases.input: Create a quality strategy for Project Atlas. No repository access is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a reduced-scope plan with explicit assumptions and Guardian warn decision.

cases.input: Make PR gates nonblocking but guarantee no critical issues merge.
cases.expected_behavior: Flags the conflict because PR gates must block critical criteria.

cases.input: Design quality gates for a healthcare release with masked test data, audit evidence, SAST, DAST, and sign-off.
cases.expected_behavior: Requires masking, security sign-off, release gate blocking, and auditable evidence.

cases.input: Validate a quality report with missing dimension, wrong test shape, and misordered priority actions.
cases.expected_behavior: Offline validator rejects the report deterministically.
